'''Jens''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] student at the [[University of Agamar]] who had blue [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and blonde [[Hair/Legends|hair]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], she was one of the members of [[Doctor/Legends|Dr.]] [[Anki Pace]]'s team to journey to [[Bimmiel/Legends|Bimmiel]].

When [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and [[Ganner Rhysode]] embarked on their rescue mission for two others students, Jens operated a remote to keep the two [[Yuuzhan Vong]] guards preoccupied. This only briefly kept the two warriors, [[Neira Shai]] and [[Dranae Shai]], away from the encampment.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' {{1st}}
